title: Homie Hardcore
description: A fun little mod that goes perfect with the Homie Hardcore server by Blazeborn and Co.
body:
**THIS MOD IS SPECIFICALLY DESIGNED FOR MY SERVER, CALLED BY THE SAME NAME AND SHOULD NOT BE USED CASUALLY**

All commands start with /h. so that you know what mod it's from, and here's the order of what you execute the commands in:
- make - do a bunch of background things like making a bedrock box for spawn with a chest of origin orbs for people to chill with, and randomize teams between Red and Blue.
- randomize [player count] - randomize teams as much as you want to get perfection
- challenge - randomize between a few preset challenge cups
- glow [true/false] - make every player glow
- start - start the games and have everyone get invincibility
- tpk [Red/Blue] - revive a team at spawn with nothing
- revive [player] - revive a player at spawn with nothing
- heal [player] - heal a player to full hunger and health
